faq.title: Questions? Answered.
faq.moreText: Still have questions? We've got more answers waiting.

items.question: Is it free to join?
items.answer: Yes. Joining B2B Insight Panel is completely free. There are no registration fees, subscription charges, or hidden costs.

items.question: What is B2B Insight Panel?
items.answer: B2B Insight Panel is a global community of business professionals and decision-makers who participate in research studies, surveys, interviews, and discussions to help organizations make better business decisions.

items.question: Who can join the community?
items.answer: Professionals from various industries and functions are welcome to join, including executives, managers, IT professionals, procurement leaders, finance experts, healthcare professionals, and other business decision-makers.

items.question: How are members selected for research opportunities?
items.answer: Research invitations are matched based on your professional profile, including factors such as industry, job role, seniority, expertise, and decision-making responsibilities. Keeping your profile updated helps us provide more relevant opportunities.

items.question: What types of research opportunities are available?
items.answer: Members may be invited to participate in online surveys, one-on-one interviews, focus groups, discussion boards, product evaluations, and industry research studies.

items.question: How long do studies typically take?
items.answer: Study durations vary depending on the research type: online surveys typically take 10–30 minutes, interviews take 30–60 minutes, and discussion boards or specialized studies may vary. Estimated participation time is always communicated beforehand.

items.question: Will I be compensated for participating?
items.answer: Yes. Members receive rewards or honorariums for successfully completing qualified research opportunities. Compensation varies depending on the study complexity, duration, and expertise required.

items.question: How are rewards processed?
items.answer: Rewards are processed securely through available payment methods, which may include PayPal, bank transfer, gift cards, UPI, or other local redemption options. Available methods may vary by country.

items.question: How are reward amounts determined?
items.answer: Reward amounts depend on factors such as study duration, level of expertise required, seniority of participants, and complexity of the research. Reward details are communicated before participation.

items.question: What happens if I do not qualify for a study?
items.answer: Some studies have specific screening requirements. If you do not qualify for a particular study, you may still receive invitations for future opportunities that better match your professional background.

items.question: Is my information kept confidential?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your personal information is protected and handled in accordance with applicable privacy regulations. Individual responses are typically analyzed in aggregate and are not shared without appropriate consent.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. We employ industry-standard security measures and privacy practices to protect member information and maintain a secure research environment.

items.question: Will my employer know that I participate?
items.answer: No. Participation is entirely voluntary and confidential. We do not notify employers regarding your participation unless explicitly required and agreed upon for a specific study.

items.question: Can I update my profile information?
items.answer: Yes. You can update your professional details, industry information, and areas of expertise at any time. Maintaining an accurate profile helps us provide more relevant research opportunities.

items.question: How often will I receive invitations?
items.answer: Invitation frequency depends on your professional background and the needs of ongoing research projects. Some professionals may receive opportunities more frequently than others based on market demand.

items.question: Can I leave the community at any time?
items.answer: Yes. You may request account deletion or unsubscribe from communications at any time.

cta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals contributing valuable insights through exclusive B2B research opportunities. No fees, no catch.
